strengths: Strong distributed-systems and event-driven architecture experience (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz)
Proven leadership in scaling engineering teams and adopting disciplined practices (e.g., RIDE Capital, Altom Consulting)
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and tooling (e.g., MCP code generators at re:cinq)
concerns: Lacks direct fintech or credit-risk experience in high-stakes commercial environments
Limited exposure to regulated financial systems or multi-jurisdictional compliance frameworks
No demonstrated production experience with real-time inference or streaming data systems in agentic-AI contexts

key_factors.factor: Scaling engineering teams in regulated environments

response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong distributed-systems expertise, disciplined engineering leadership, and emerging agentic-AI involvement, but lacks direct fintech or credit-risk experience required for this role. His background in event-driven platforms and scaling teams is a strong foundation, yet the absence of regulated financial systems exposure and real-time agentic-AI production deployments raises concerns for the CTO role in fintech infrastructure.
